Scripts.OnClick: local id = this:GetParent():GetID() local member = getglobal("XyFrameListButton"..id.."Name"):GetText() -- 获取当前分数并增加 local current = tonumber(getglobal("XyFrameListButton"..id.."DKP"):GetText()) or 0 XyAddDkp(member, 1) -- 确保这个函数会更新存储的数据 getglobal("XyFrameListButton"..id.."DKP"):SetText(current + 1)
Scripts.OnLoad: -- 加载时检查权限 if IsLeader then this:Show() else this:Hide() end

Scripts.OnClick: local id = this:GetParent():GetID() local member = getglobal("XyFrameListButton"..id.."Name"):GetText() -- 获取当前分数并减少 local current = tonumber(getglobal("XyFrameListButton"..id.."DKP"):GetText()) or 0 XyMinusDkp(member, 1) -- 确保这个函数会更新存储的数据 getglobal("XyFrameListButton"..id.."DKP"):SetText(current - 1)
Scripts.OnLoad: -- 加载时检查权限 if IsLeader then this:Show() else this:Hide() end

Scripts.OnEnter: GameTooltip_SetDefaultAnchor(GameTooltip, UIParent); GameTooltip:SetText("开启/关闭 许愿监视");

FontString.name: autoAnnounceTitle
FontString.text: 许愿重复警报及许愿自动查询
